---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, capability, or optimization
title: '[FEAT] Short title of feature request'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 🧠 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem or limitation is (e.g. "I keep having issue X when doing Y...").

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution or capability you would like to see added.

---

## 🛠️ Alternative Implementations Considered
List any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

---

## 📌 Additional Context
Add any other context, slides, transcripts, or examples about the feature request here.
